response.original_title: Heritage Singers - Simply Heritage: A Musical Journey
response.overview: A warm, nostalgic celebration of faith, harmony, and musical legacy, Simply Heritage: A Musical Journey chronicles more than three decades of ministry from the world‑renowned Heritage Singers. Blending concert performances, archival footage, and personal reflections, this documentary‑style musical experience highlights the group’s evolution from its early 1971 beginnings to its global influence as one of Christian music’s most beloved vocal ensembles.  Through classic songs such as “The Lighthouse,” “God’s Wonderful People,” “Farther Along,” “Daystar,” “Champion of Love,” and more, the film revisits the timeless melodies that have inspired generations. Interwoven throughout are special segments including “30 Years of Memories with Max and Lucy,” “The Lighthouse – Past and Present,” “Come Alive Specials,” and the 30th Reunion Anniversary, offering fans an intimate look at the group’s history, ministry, and enduring message.
response.title: Heritage Singers - Simply Heritage: A Musical Journey
